faqs.question: What does general pest control service include in West Orange?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service in West Orange includes a comprehensive inspection, interior and exterior treatment for common pests like ants, roaches, spiders, silverfish, and earwigs, plus preventative barrier application around your property's foundation and entry points. We also provide customized treatment recommendations based on your specific pest issues.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide pest control service in West Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout West Orange and surrounding Essex County areas. Simply call us in the morning, and in most cases, our licensed technicians can be at your property within hours to address your pest concerns promptly and professionally.

faqs.question: Why does the price range from $175 to $300?
faqs.answer: Pricing varies based on your property size, the severity of the infestation, and the type of pests being treated. Smaller homes or apartments with minor pest issues typically fall at the lower end around $175, while larger properties or more extensive infestations may cost up to $300. We always provide upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for families and pets in West Orange homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. We prioritize both effectiveness and safety in every West Orange home we service.
